hero.subtitleLead: 10+ years of experience helping startups scale.
hero.subtitleBody: Passionate about software architecture, performance, and… otters 🦦

expertise.title: Technical expertise
expertise.description: Solid foundations for your most demanding web and mobile applications.

items.title: Backend engineering (Node/TS)
items.description: Robust, scalable development with TypeScript, NestJS, Express, and many other frameworks, with a strong focus on maintainability and testing.

items.title: Architecture & DevOps
items.description: Cloud or on-premise infrastructure setup, continuous delivery with GitHub Actions, and container-first deployment workflows.

items.title: Advisory & audits
items.description: Performance audits, code reviews, and strategic guidance to support your technical decisions.

experience.label: of experience
experience.description: Supporting fast-growing startups (Series A/B/C) on critical product and platform challenges.

contentSection.liveDescription: Join me on Twitch for live coding sessions.
contentSection.description: I regularly share my day-to-day developer work, what I discover in NodeJS, and the open-source tools I rely on the most.

meeting.title: A meeting
meeting.descriptionBody: Whether we end up working together or not, the goal is to create value for you from day one.
meeting.descriptionOutcome: 👉 You bring a question or a blocker, and you leave with an actionable plan.
topics: Choosing the right stack or platform.
Prioritizing an MVP or unblocking a complex bug.
deliverables: A concise summary of our conversation.
Tools and resources tailored to your situation.

footer.bio: Backend solutions architect with a passion for resilient platforms.

consent.message: We use analytics cookies to understand how you interact with our website and improve it. You can accept or decline them.
